decisions.briefing: Markets posted a strong risk-on session with NASDAQ up 1.6% and S&P 500 up 1.0%, with tech and growth stocks leading broad participation. My portfolio sits at a healthy +31.6%, but cash is $477.14 — just below the $500 threshold to trigger new position entries, so no new buys this session. Holding all 6 current positions and waiting for cash to build naturally before deploying into top-ranked candidates like NVDA, LEU, or KMX.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied broadly today as investor risk appetite strengthened, with the NASDAQ surging 1.6% on continued momentum in AI infrastructure and semiconductor themes. The S&P 500 gained 1.0%, reflecting participation beyond just mega-cap tech and signaling institutional buying across growth sectors. Momentum indicators across the screener confirmed the shift, with top-scoring names concentrated in chips, AI hardware, and high-growth mid-caps.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市今日全面上漲，投資者風險偏好明顯回升，納斯達克指數大漲1.6%，主要受惠於人工智慧基礎建設及半導體產業動能持續升溫。標普500指數上漲1.0%，反映資金買盤已擴散至大型科技股以外的成長類別，顯示機構投資者積極佈局。選股模型的動能指標亦印證這一趨勢，高分個股集中於晶片、AI硬體及高成長中型股，市場整體呈現典型的風險偏好格局。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A risk-on environment is when investors grow confident about economic conditions and rotate capital from safe-haven assets (like bonds or gold) into higher-risk, higher-reward investments like growth stocks and tech. Today's NASDAQ +1.6% alongside S&P +1.0% is a textbook risk-on signal — broad participation with growth leading. Our screener captured this: the highest-scoring candidates today are all momentum-driven tech and semiconductor names, exactly the sectors that outperform when risk appetite is elevated.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險偏好」市場環境是指投資者對經濟前景信心增強，主動將資金從債券、黃金等避險資產轉移至科技股、成長股等高風險高回報的投資標的。今日納斯達克漲1.6%、標普500漲1.0%，正是教科書式的風險偏好訊號——各板塊廣泛上揚，由成長股領跑。我們的選股系統即時反映這一趨勢：今日評分最高的候選標的清一色為動能驅動的科技及半導體個股，這正是風險偏好升溫時最易跑贏大市的板塊。
